Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Patrick, I'm not sure the state of the pfind series right now. If you want me to rebase this on  some other patch let me know.

Hi Timothy, to chime in here: Both points are addressed in the pfind patch series. The "sleep" was replaced with the actual "llapi_semantic_traverse()". This patch landed (I think earlier today). 

The last patch of the series #57306 also fixes the "__sync_fetch_and_sub()". So, it seems this patch is not needed.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1:
> >

> 
> Hi Timothy, to chime in here: Both points are addressed in the pfind patch series. The "sleep" was replaced with the actual "llapi_semantic_traverse()". This patch landed (I think earlier today). 
> 
> The last patch of the series #57306 also fixes the "__sync_fetch_and_sub()". So, it seems this patch is not needed.

Sounds good. I'll abandon this once those patches are landed.

parents.subject: LU-18972 lustreapi: Add missing man3 documentation

commit.subject: LU-17814 utils: fix compiler errors in pfind
commit.message:
LU-17814 utils: fix compiler errors in pfind

Use ll_sync_fetch_and_sub instead of __sync_fetch_and_sub.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: e505e7dbfb8b5 ("LU-17814 utils: Add work unit management")
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I9b58b0c7fe991f4d99d163e13cd326f0ba3dfaaa
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/59691
Reviewed-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
